raw_text:
Nimbus Technologies // Lead Cloud Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-first with quarterly in-person collaboration) | Full-time | $185,000 -
$240,000 USD annually, plus equity and performance bonus

Enterprise cloud infrastructure, simplified and optimized

>> ABOUT

Nimbus Technologies is a Series B cloud infrastructure and DevOps solutions provider that
helps enterprises architect, deploy, and manage scalable cloud environments. Our platform

abstracts complexity across multi-cloud deployments, enabling organizations to reduce
costs, improve security, and accelerate their digital transformation. With a focus on

automation and operational excellence, we serve Fortune 500 companies and fast-growing
startups across North America and Europe.

>> SUMMARY

Nimbus Technologies is seeking an experienced Lead Cloud Engineer to lead our core
infrastructure team and drive the design and implementation of cloud architecture

solutions for our enterprise customers. You will mentor a team of 4-6 engineers,
architect scalable AWS-based infrastructure, and establish best practices for

infrastructure-as-code, networking, and cost optimization. In this role, you'll combine
hands-on technical expertise with strategic leadership, working closely with Product and

Customer Success to shape our platform roadmap.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Lead and mentor a team of 4-6 cloud engineers, conducting code reviews, providing

technical guidance, and fostering a culture of continuous learning and innovation
- Design and architect enterprise-grade AWS infrastructure solutions across EC2, VPC,

Lambda, and managed services; evaluate trade-offs between cost, performance, and
resilience

- Establish and maintain infrastructure-as-code standards using Terraform and
CloudFormation; drive adoption of IaC best practices across the organization

- Own the optimization and cost management of AWS environments; implement tagging
strategies, reserved instance planning, and right-sizing initiatives that reduce

customer spend by 20-30%
- Implement and oversee security, networking, and IAM policies; ensure all deployments

meet compliance requirements (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI-DSS)
- Collaborate with Product and Sales teams to define technical requirements for new

platform features and validate architectural feasibility
- Champion observability and monitoring; implement and refine Prometheus, CloudWatch,

and ELK stack integrations for proactive incident detection
- Lead on-call rotation and incident response for critical infrastructure incidents;

conduct post-mortems and drive improvements
- Influence engineering culture by establishing coding standards, documentation

practices, and knowledge-sharing sessions across the team

>> MUST HAVE

- 6+ years of professional experience in cloud infrastructure, platform engineering,

or DevOps roles; 2+ years in a leadership or senior technical role
- Deep hands-on expertise with AWS services including EC2, RDS, VPC, Lambda, S3,

CloudFormation, and IAM

 - Strong proficiency in Infrastructure-as-Code tools, particularly Terraform;

experience with version control (Git) and CI/CD pipelines
- Proven experience architecting and managing production workloads at scale;

demonstrated expertise in networking, security, and cost optimization
- Experience mentoring junior engineers and contributing to team growth; comfortable

with code reviews, technical interviews, and defining best practices
- Solid understanding of Linux/Unix administration, shell scripting, and automation

- Excellent communication skills with ability to present technical concepts to both
technical and non-technical stakeholders

>> NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with multi-cloud deployments (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and hybrid cloud
architectures

- Familiarity with containerization and Kubernetes; experience with ECS or EKS
- Knowledge of Python or Go for infrastructure automation and tooling

- AWS Solutions Architect Professional or similar cloud certification

>> STACK

AWS (EC2, RDS, VPC, Lambda, S3, CloudFormation, IAM, CloudWatch) / Terraform / Kubernetes

(ECS/EKS) / Prometheus / ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) / Git and GitHub / Jenkins

/ GitLab CI / Ansible / Python / Bash scripting / Docker

>> BENEFITS

- Competitive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with company coverage at 80%

of premiums
- Equity package (0.5% - 1.5% depending on level) with 4-year vesting and 1-year cliff

- Professional development budget ($3,000/year) for conferences, certifications, and
training

- Flexible PTO policy with a minimum of 20 days plus 10 company holidays
- Remote-first work environment with quarterly in-person team weeks in San Francisco

- Comprehensive mental health support including therapy stipend ($2,000/year)
- 401(k) matching up to 4% of salary

- Home office equipment stipend ($1,500 one-time)

>> APPLY

Submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your leadership experience and

infrastructure accomplishments, and a portfolio or GitHub link showcasing your
infrastructure-as-code work. Apply via our careers page at nimbustech.io/careers or email

careers@nimbustech.io with the subject line 'Lead Cloud Engineer Application'. Initial
screening calls are scheduled within 48 hours for qualified candidates.
